hypothesis: H1 (LR-floor probe) — s3-d2 closed 80% of the gap by dropping LR 2e-5 -> 5e-6. If LR remains the binding constraint, dropping further to 1e-6 should continue to recover gifts/lobbying and possibly bring keyword queries up. If 1e-6 plateaus or regresses, we have evidence the LR ramp has bottomed out and the residual -0.021 is a different mechanism (H4 distribution mismatch, or residual catastrophic forgetting requiring LoRA).
